headline: DaVita Stock Gains From Integrated Kidney Care and CKCC Progress
summary: DVA expands its IKC platform, tops CKCC savings in first-quarter 2026 and rolls out AI ScheduleHub to boost scheduling and staffing.

headline: Baxter International (BAX) Faces Tough Road Ahead, Says Citi in Downgrade
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $1.25 billion, Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 28, Citi analyst Joanne Wuensch downgraded Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) to Sell from Neutral. She lowered the price target on the stock to $17 from $19. In a research note, the […]
